rationale: The specific name reserved with the SOS that is being transferred. Lives under entity.* (not name_reservation.*) because the reserved name is treated as a candidate-entity-name attribute throughout 31 MRSA.
Name of the person or entity that originally reserved the name and is now transferring it (the transferor).
Name of the person or entity receiving the reserved name.
Mailing address of the transferee. Single-line combined widget on this form (not split into street / city_state_zip).
Date the transferor signed the document.

label_verbatim: ORIGINAL APPLICANT (Transferor): (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed name + capacity of the transferor. Shape D per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md. The adjacent '(signature of transferor)' line is wet-ink-only — no AcroForm widget.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($20 base per page-0 fee header, plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing

rationale: Annual-report reminder email — reserved-name transfers don't have annual reports, but the cover letter is shared across SOS divisions; field may be left blank for this filing type.
